GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: During free spins, all wins are multiplied by x3.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_3: Any gold-framed symbols that have been transformed into Wild symbols will reveal a multiplier of either x2, x3 or x4 depending on how many symbol spaces it occupies.
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_6_Payout4_4: When 1 or more Wild symbols with multiplier are involved in a win, the win for that round will be multiplied by the Wild symbol's multiplier(s) (in addition to the x3 multiplier on all win).
GaneshaFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_9_Payout4_5: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 8 more free spins.

GaneshaFortuneRule.Rule1_1: Ganesha Fortune is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins with Wild multipliers.
GaneshaFortuneRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GaneshaFortuneRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
GaneshaFortuneRule.Rule4_5: Wild symbols that occupy 2, 3 or 4 symbol spaces will reveal the multiplier of x2, x3 or x4 respectively.
GaneshaFortuneRule.Rule4_8: Scatter symbols appears on the top additional reel only.

GaneshaFortunePayout.ScatterDescription: 4 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature
GaneshaFortunePayout.WildDescription: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol
